evals.prompt: extract AI coding agent insights from this: https://pca.st/episode/cc744c24-99d9-45eb-8fb6-fe68457af56b
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers. Identifies the episode (No Priors / Karpathy), searches transcript-sources.md → tries no-priors.com / Substack. Fetches the transcript via defuddle. Passes transcript to gemini with focused extraction prompt for AI coding agent insights. Writes to ~/.claude/podcast-process/extractions/<date>-<slug>.md. Does NOT invoke Whisper or any transcription service.

evals.prompt: what did tim ferriss' guest say about sleep on this episode: https://tim.blog/2024/10/15/matthew-walker-sleep/
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers. Identifies Tim Ferriss podcast (transcripts on tim.blog). The URL IS the transcript location already — fetch with defuddle directly. Extract sleep-focused insights. Skip generic insights that aren't about sleep.

Skill triggers but cannot find a transcript (indie podcast, not in transcript-sources.md, no YouTube upload, no Podscribe coverage). Skill stops, tells the user clearly that no transcript exists, suggests alternatives (YouTube upload if available, dedicated transcription service). Does NOT fabricate content from the episode title. Does NOT attempt Whisper.

evals.prompt: can you summarise this blog post: https://simonwillison.net/2026/03/agent-patterns/
evals.expected_output: Skill does NOT trigger — this is a blog post, not a podcast. Use defuddle instead.
